what_it_does: An exhaustive read-only dragnet landscape (2026-06-21) of the cognition area's five file-discovered registries: roles/ (30 source files), minds/ (4), generation_policies/ (6), lifters/ (3), ai_tics/ (7). For each it gives the constitution/schema, a full per-row inventory with op/mode_scope/jury/description, and a gaps/surprises list, then closes with cross-cutting architecture patterns, a seam inventory (declared-but-unbuilt), capability tiers, and a file-count-vs-brief reconciliation.
observations: Inventories all 30 roles with op/mode_scope/jury/description, grouped by cast (core/legacy, listening, walkthrough, explain-wire, jury, reduce, registry-generation, spec-compiler, verification, option-panel, transcript-miner, drift-radar, atlas/agent-authored)
Provides a mode->cast mapping (listening, walkthrough, registration, verification, mining, spec, panel, drift, none/explicit)
Documents the newest mechanism: explain_role's prompt_slot + coordinate={subtype} that REPLACES prompt_template wholesale at run-time (4 subtypes; 2026-06-21)

Flags concrete role gaps: check chainer (G3/G4) not built, reduce_synth capability-tier mismatch, judge dual-binding (G8), mine_exchange pattern_tag embed-cluster not built, triad_synth max_tokens caller-contract gotcha, confirm_registration sys.path hardcode
minds/ has NO AGENTS.md constitution (clear gap); 4 source files (extractor/judge role-minds, pair composition, bind_compose_test binding); brief said 13

generation_policies/ schema centers on rep_penalty_ladder (the cure for the degenerate-repetition pathology); four policy.* dot-named explain policies authored 2026-06-21; ladder-into-run_role wiring may NOT be built
lifters/ has 3 deterministic extractors (frontmatter/links/blocks); create_lifter authoring face NOT built; frontmatter fail-softs to a line-parser if PyYAML absent

ai_tics/ has 7 tics all seeded from Tim's NAMED frustrations (framework_imposition, versioning, false_finality, silent_fallback, agent_arch, closure_form, mvp); fingerprint mark-pass (M4) NOT wired; markers are exact-string
Cross-cutting: file-discovered registry, no-model-inside-a-rule (L2), floor invariant (no resolve/approve/dispatch tokens), no-confidence-floats (G16) consistently applied
File-count reconciliation: brief counts (97/13/16/11/23) included __pycache__ artifacts; real source counts are 30/4/6/3/7; two Python versions (cpython-312 and -314) exercised the code
standouts: explain_role's prompt_slot + coordinate mechanism: the prompt is replaced wholesale by subtype at run-time (no placeholders) — the newest and unique pattern in the layer
ai_tics as Tim's CLAUDE.md frustrations materialized as subtract-direction marks (denoising = surfacing the inversion)
Rigorous no-confidence-float law shown migrating register_element from confidence:float (empirically flat at 0.85) to a discrete grounding tag
conventions: Follows the area-landscape dragnet format (constitution/inventory/gaps per module) shared with sibling AREA-*.md files
Follows registry-is-truth (drop a file = add an entry; id == file stem) across all five registries
Follows no-model-inside-a-rule (L2), fail-loud, no-confidence-floats (G16), and the floor invariant (no resolve/approve/dispatch)
Reports honest seam inventory (declared-but-unbuilt) and file-count-vs-brief reconciliation
concerns: Single 2026-06-21 snapshot; the explain-wire and policy batch were authored the same day and their wiring status is explicitly open
Many seams are declared-but-unbuilt (check chainer, fingerprint pass, create_lifter/create_ai_tic faces, rep_penalty ladder wiring) — the catalogues exist but the integrations may not
minds/ lacks a constitution and its source-count contradicts the brief, leaving the module under-documented
notes: The cognition terrain map: five file-discovered registries (roles/minds/generation_policies/lifters/ai_tics) with full inventories, the new explain_role prompt_slot mechanism, the no-confidence/no-model-in-rule/floor invariants, and a seam list of what's declared but not yet wired.
questions: Has run_role been wired to actually read the rep_penalty_ladder, and is the M4 fingerprint mark-pass built?
Is the check chaining executor (G3/G4) and the mine_exchange pattern_tag embed-cluster built yet?
Will minds/ get an AGENTS.md constitution, and what is its intended real-vs-fixture set?
purpose_vs_actual: Match: it sets out to exhaustively inventory the five cognition registries with schemas, full role/policy/lifter/tic sets, and gaps, and it delivers that plus cross-cutting patterns, a seam list, and capability tiers.
apparent_themes: No model inside a rule; render/judge separation
No confidence floats; discrete tags and ordinal ranks
Fail-loud and the floor invariant (no resolve/approve/dispatch)
intention_signals: It is trying to give builders a complete, accurate inventory of the cognition layer's declarative registries — every role/policy/lifter/tic with its schema and status — and to separate what is catalogued from what is actually wired, so the next build targets real gaps rather than re-declaring existing rows.
novelty: The coordinate-resolved prompt_slot (whole-prompt replacement by decision subtype) and the ai-tic catalogue derived directly from Tim's named frustrations as subtract-direction fingerprints are distinctive mechanisms surfaced here.
contribution: Contributes a complete schema-and-inventory reference for the five cognition registries (roles, minds, generation_policies, lifters, ai_tics), the mode->cast mapping, the capability-tier scheme, and a precise seam list of declared-but-unbuilt cognition wiring.
summary_for_embedding: An exhaustive 2026-06-21 dragnet of the Company cognition area's five file-discovered registries (30 roles, 4 minds, 6 generation_policies, 3 lifters, 7 ai_tics), with full per-row inventories, the new explain_role prompt_slot/coordinate mechanism, the no-confidence/no-model-in-rule/floor invariants, a mode->cast map, capability tiers, and a declared-but-unbuilt seam list.
intention_for_embedding: To give builders an accurate inventory of the cognition layer's declarative registries and a clear separation of what is catalogued versus what is actually wired, so new work targets real gaps.
